concerns.text: FR-001 requires a *clean* step for the downloaded datasets, but no task in tasks.md addresses data cleaning (e.g., validation, missing‑value handling, type coercion) after download. Only T019 implements dataset download.

SC-004 mandates measuring computational execution time against the GitHub Actions free‑tier runner limit, yet tasks.md contains no task that records or asserts execution‑time constraints for the full simulation suite.
